title: PR Tasks Input
description: Input format for the PR tasks stage. Lists the PR checks the coder must address and which checks are off-limits.

pr_url.description: URL to the GitHub pull request

branch.description: Git branch name for the PR

checks.description: PR status checks that need attention. The coder must investigate and resolve each one.

name.description: Full check name as shown in the PR status checks (e.g. 'CarBench Status', 'Simtest Status')

targetUrl.description: URL to the check's detailed output (may be null)

ignored_checks.description: Check names that must NOT be investigated or acted upon. The coder must skip these entirely.
